data.queryValue:
WITH
-- 0) Параметры DataLens
list_p AS (
  SELECT
    /* мультиселектор GEO */
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g') = ''
        THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(
             regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g'),
             ','
           )::text[]
    END AS geo_arr,
    /* мультиселектор источников UTM по ПЕРВОЙ СДЕЛКЕ */
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{utm_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g') = ''
        THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(
             regexp_replace($$ {{utm_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g'),
             ','
           )::text[]
    END AS utm_arr
),
param_p AS (
  -- окно склейки покупок в одну «сессию», дней (например, 14)
  SELECT COALESCE({{date_book_interval}}, 0)::int AS book_window_days
),

/* 0a) Первая СДЕЛКА клиента (по creation_date_time) и её utmsource */
first_deal_rows AS (
  SELECT
    cp.person_key,
    l.crm_id,
    l.creation_date_time::timestamp AS first_deal_dt,
    NULLIF(trim(l.utmsource), '')   AS utmsource
  FROM mart.parent_child_leads l
  JOIN v_person_key cp
    ON cp.account_id      = l.account_id
   AND cp.contacts_amo_id = l.contacts_amo_id
  WHERE l.creation_date_time IS NOT NULL
),
first_deal_global AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (fdr.person_key)
         fdr.person_key,
         fdr.first_deal_dt,
         COALESCE(fdr.utmsource, 'unknown') AS first_deal_utmsource,
         fdr.crm_id                          AS first_deal_crm_id
  FROM first_deal_rows fdr
  ORDER BY fdr.person_key, fdr.first_deal_dt, fdr.crm_id
),

-- 1) Покупки для отчёта (GEO + интервал) из мат.вью + мягкий фильтр по UTM ПЕРВОЙ СДЕЛКИ
report_pp AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.crm_id,
    v.booking_date,
    v.deal_amount,
    v.revenue,
    v.geo,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', v.booking_date)::date AS month
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  LEFT JOIN first_deal_global fdg USING (person_key)     -- << не выкидываем клиентов при пустом UTM
  CROSS JOIN list_p lp
  WHERE v.geo IN ('ОАЭ','Москва','Грузия','Таиланд','Бали','Таиланд Eng')
    AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR v.geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))  -- фильтр GEO
    AND (lp.utm_arr IS NULL OR fdg.first_deal_utmsource = ANY(lp.utm_arr)) -- фильтр по источнику ПЕРВОЙ СДЕЛКИ
    AND v.booking_date >= {{interval_from}}::date         -- полуинтервал [from, to)
    AND v.booking_date <  {{interval_to}}::date
),

-- 2) Люди в отчёте
persons_in_scope AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT person_key FROM report_pp
),

-- 3) Глобальные старты сессий (для людей отчёта) по окну date_book_interval
episodes_global_scoped AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.booking_date AS episode_start
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  JOIN persons_in_scope s USING (person_key)
  WHERE v.prev_booking_date IS NULL
     OR (v.booking_date - v.prev_booking_date) >
        ((SELECT book_window_days::text FROM param_p) || ' days')::interval
),

-- 4) Первая покупка месяца по человеку (в отчётном наборе)
first_in_month AS (
  SELECT person_key, month, MIN(booking_date) AS first_month_buy
  FROM report_pp
  GROUP BY person_key, month
),

-- 5) Последняя глобальная покупка ДО первой покупки месяца
prev_global_before AS (
  SELECT
    fim.person_key,
    fim.month,
    MAX(v.booking_date) AS prev_before
  FROM first_in_month fim
  JOIN v_person_purchases_prev v
    ON v.person_key = fim.person_key
   AND v.booking_date < fim.first_month_buy
  GROUP BY fim.person_key, fim.month
),

-- 6) Кол-во сессий, стартовавших ВНУТРИ месяца
month_episodes AS (
  SELECT
    fim.person_key,
    fim.month,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE eg.episode_start >= fim.month
        AND eg.episode_start <  (fim.month + INTERVAL '1 month')
    ) AS cnt_month_episodes
  FROM first_in_month fim
  LEFT JOIN episodes_global_scoped eg
    ON eg.person_key = fim.person_key
  GROUP BY fim.person_key, fim.month
),

-- 7) Классификация месяца по согласованной логике (как в retention)
classified AS (
  SELECT
    fim.month,
    fim.person_key,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(me.cnt_month_episodes, 0) >= 2 THEN 'Повторная покупка'
      WHEN pgb.prev_before IS NOT NULL
           AND (fim.first_month_buy - pgb.prev_before) >
               ((SELECT book_window_days::text FROM param_p) || ' days')::interval
        THEN 'Повторная покупка'
      ELSE 'Одна покупка'
    END AS purchase_group
  FROM first_in_month fim
  LEFT JOIN prev_global_before pgb
    ON pgb.person_key = fim.person_key AND pgb.month = fim.month
  LEFT JOIN month_episodes me
    ON me.person_key = fim.person_key AND me.month = fim.month
),

-- 8) Клиенты по месяцам
monthly_clients AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    purchase_group,
    COUNT(DISTINCT person_key) AS clients_count
  FROM classified
  GROUP BY month, purchase_group
),

-- 9) Суммы по месяцам (агрегируем покупки отчётного набора по группе месяца)
monthly_sums AS (
  SELECT
    c.month,
    c.purchase_group,
    SUM(r.deal_amount) AS total_deal_amount,
    SUM(r.revenue)     AS total_revenue
  FROM classified c
  JOIN report_pp r
    ON r.person_key = c.person_key
   AND r.month      = c.month
  GROUP BY c.month, c.purchase_group
)

-- 10) Итог: клиенты + суммы + доли по месяцам
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(mc.month, 'MM.YYYY') AS period,
  mc.purchase_group            AS "Группа",
  mc.clients_count             AS "Клиентов",
  ROUND(100.0 * mc.clients_count
        / NULLIF(SUM(mc.clients_count) OVER (PARTITION BY mc.month), 0), 2) AS "Доля клиентов, %",
  ms.total_deal_amount,
  ROUND(100.0 * ms.total_deal_amount
        / NULLIF(SUM(ms.total_deal_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY ms.month), 0), 2) AS "Доля суммы сделок, %",
  ms.total_revenue,
  ROUND(100.0 * ms.total_revenue
        / NULLIF(SUM(ms.total_revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY ms.month), 0), 2)     AS "Доля выручки, %"
FROM monthly_clients mc
LEFT JOIN monthly_sums ms
  ON ms.month = mc.month AND ms.purchase_group = mc.purchase_group
ORDER BY mc.month, CASE mc.purchase_group WHEN 'Одна покупка' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
